description: A registered lobbyist is filing their required monthly report of their activities and expenditures.

nodes.task_description: Identify the lobbyist and the correct reporting period.

expected_outcome.value: The lobbyist logs in and selects the correct month for their report.

nodes.task_description: Enter details of all lobbying contacts and any related expenditures.

expected_outcome.value: The lobbyist accurately fills out the disclosure form.
The lobbyist successfully files their monthly disclosure.
